title: RL-010 OEM/door saturation honesty gate — demote VERIFIED labels; keep CANDIDATE_ACQUISITION_RECOMMENDED
reason: Operator sprint asserted VERIFIED_EVIDENCE / SPECIFICATION_READY / CROSS_VERIFIED / 90% geometry completeness without local hashed bytes. Honesty gate demotes those labels while preserving useful hunt inventory and acquisition recommendation.
decision: Map EDTS-OEM-001..005 to SRC-CAND hunt records (000001, 000005, 000002, 000006, 000007); all remain NOT_ACQUIRED.
Reject VERIFIED_EVIDENCE / DOCUMENT_SUPPORTED / CROSS_VERIFIED / SPECIFICATION_READY from URL indexing or narrative alone.
Draft component passports under research/component_passports/ are ILLUSTRATIVE_ONLY; kernel passport geometry stays ABSENT.
Catalog CAND-000043-GRAB (GrabCAD door shell) and CAND-000044-TS (TurboSquid 1598273) as DISCOVERED / NOT_ACQUIRED — no invented listing URLs.
Evidence graph and torque/YouTube/procedure edges are ILLUSTRATIVE_ONLY / NOT_CONFIRMED until hashed workshop + media proof.
Coverage matrix demoted: CANDIDATE / RESEARCH_REQUIRED / DOCUMENT_HUNT — qualitative estimates only (Hard Rule 5).

Recommended decision remains CANDIDATE_ACQUISITION_RECOMMENDED: (1) SRC-CAND-000004 profile reference, (2) door shell CAD after real URL/license, (3) schedule FL door internal scan protocol, (4) parallel OEM PDF lanes.
Frozen kernel and component-passport rc1 unchanged.
